name: Chesaning Area Picklers
description: Chesaning Area Picklers is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chesaning, MI. There are 7 wood and concrete courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, lights, and water.

name: Frankenmuth HS Tennis Courts
description: Frankenmuth HS Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Frankenmuth, MI. There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Freeland Sportszone
description: Come play pickleball at Freeland Sportszone in Freeland, MI! There are 12 wood courts. 8 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Indoor schedule. Monday-Friday open play 6-9 Saturday 3 pm. Sunday 9:00 am
fees: Fee required — $50 monthly family pass. $15 daily pass

name: Imerman Park
description: Imerman Park is a place to play pickleball in Saginaw, MI. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Olson Courts
description: Olson Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saginaw, MI. There are 8 asphalt courts. 6 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Saginaw Township Center Courts
description: Saginaw Township Center Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saginaw, MI. There are 9 courts. 3 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Zilwaukee Pool Park
description: Zilwaukee Pool Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saginaw, MI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.
